title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3-C.  LOUISIANA HOUSING PRESERVATION ACT

§600.31.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Housing Preservation Act".

Acts 2006, No. 355, §1, eff. June 13, 2006.

CHAPTER 3-C.  LOUISIANA HOUSING PRESERVATION ACT
§600.31.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Housing Preservation Act".
Acts 2006, No. 355, §1, eff. June 13, 2006.
